title: Which Companies Are Hiring Frontend Engineers Right Now? (Live ATS Data)
description: Tracker of 16 frontend openings across 8 employers, 50% remote, captured 2026-07-12.
answer_first: 16 frontend roles were open across 8 company job boards when this dataset was captured on July 12, 2026. Airbnb accounts for the most of them, 3, and 50% of the roles listed are remote. Snapshot number 1 for this query landed 2026-07-12 with 16 roles; week-over-week changes start with the next refresh. The full breakdown, with company, title, location, remote status, and posted date for each role, follows below.
rows: Staff Frontend Engineer, Client Data & Networking Platform
Frontend Product Software Engineer, Design Systems
Senior Frontend Software Engineer, Home Experience
Senior Software Engineer | GTM Platform, Frontend
Staff Software Engineer, Frontend (Consumer - Advanced Trading)
New York, NY (HQ); Remote (Canada); San Francisco, CA; Remote (US); Miami, FL
facts: Across all boards checked on 2026-07-12, 16 frontend roles were open at 8 companies.
Top of the hiring table: Airbnb (3 roles), then Databricks (3).
50% of the list (8 of 16 roles) carries a remote flag.
More roles list Remote - USA than any other location: 3.
0 listings are less than 7 days old as of the fetch date.
Dataset baseline: 16 roles at first capture on 2026-07-12.

faq.q: How is this openings table built?
faq.a: A scraper walks public ATS careers endpoints (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby) and keeps roles matching 'frontend'. The 2026-07-12 run produced the 16 rows shown here from 8 companies, unedited apart from column formatting.

faq.q: What company currently posts the most of these roles?
faq.a: Airbnb does, with 3 openings; Databricks follows at 3. Together the boards held 16 matching roles when fetched.

faq.q: Is remote work common in this sample?
faq.a: It covers 50% of the sample: 8 of the 16 captured roles are listed as remote. The rest name a specific location, shown per row.

faq.q: Is this page kept up to date?
faq.a: Yes - it is regenerated from a new board scrape on a schedule, always at this URL. The current table is from 2026-07-12, with 0 roles posted in the final 7 days before capture.

related_product.name: Company Careers Job Scraper (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby)
